'''Keeth Anak''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] who operated as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. His mother [[Death/Legends|died]] of unknown causes when he was young and as a teenager he killed his abusive father. Keeth and his sister, [[Odon Anak]], fled their home and went on to work together as bounty hunters.
